violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw chicken and raw eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods bean sprouts and hot oil in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The junctures in interior basins of 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. Food safety certificate is current. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2025

Various raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as vegetables in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The junctures in interior basins of 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2025
Shelving in walk-in cooler were observed lined with cardboard. This material is not easily cleanable. PIC informed to cease practice. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of various food storing containers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Raw animal foods (such as) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in fridge have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2023
The floor around the drain in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
